data.name: Hentai World West
data.detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in a captivating and relaxing puzzle game where every completed level brings you unlocking stunning, sexy girls. Enjoy a soothing atmosphere enhanced by gentle background music as you piece together each puzzle. Swap and arrange tiles strategically to reveal the full image, progressing through levels that gradually increase in difficulty.

With no time limits, you can play at your own pace, fully savoring the satisfaction of completing each puzzle. Whether you're a casual player or a puzzle enthusiast, this game offers an enjoyable and visually rewarding experience.

Features:

Unlock beautiful and sexy girl images with every completed level.

Relaxing background music to enhance your puzzle-solving experience.

Full-view mode available once the puzzle is completed.

Multiple levels with increasing difficulty for a more engaging challenge.

No time limits—play and enjoy at your own pace.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
